scope: 8 repos: focalpoint, phenotype-infra, phenotype-tooling, phenotype-shared (phenoShared), phenotype-journeys, phenotype-landing, thegent, OmniRoute
method: static read-only: top-level layout, ARCHITECTURE.md/SPEC.md presence + content, hexagonal dir markers (port/adapter/domain/use_cases), Cargo workspace dep edges, README signal

FocalPoint.domain_boundaries: clear (60 crates, focus-* prefix; apps/services/tooling split)
FocalPoint.module_coupling: high: 205 internal-dep edges across crates/* (Cargo workspace, resolver=2)
FocalPoint.cycles: not detected statically (cargo metadata skipped; resolver=2 mitigates)
FocalPoint.notes: Largest workspace; arch doc is honest skeleton admitting future expansion. Domain prefix 'focus-*' enforces semantic boundary. services/ and tooling/ are separate crate groups.

phenotype-infra.notes: Single-source-of-truth for 7-node compute mesh. Topologies live in docs/specs/. No code coupling risk by nature. Lacks formal ARCHITECTURE.md at root.

phenotype-tooling.domain_boundaries: weak (crates/, packages/, bin/, Tools/, governance/, templates/ flat)
phenotype-tooling.module_coupling: low (27 crates, 0 internal-dep edges detected — independent tools)
phenotype-tooling.notes: Tool grab-bag, intentionally flat coupling. No ARCHITECTURE.md. Boundaries by directory convention only.

phenotype-shared.arch_doc: not inspected (path: /repos/phenoShared, not /repos/phenotype-shared; directory exists with phenoShared-wtrees and ph-shared)
phenotype-shared.notes: Spec mismatch: requested 'phenotype-shared' — actual dir is 'phenoShared' (case differs, hyphen vs no). Marked as path-mapping issue, not scored.

phenotype-journeys.notes: Small focused workspace; clear 3-component split. Lacks formal arch doc.

phenotype-landing.arch_doc: SPEC.md (41L, explicit factory model with 7-site registry)
phenotype-landing.module_coupling: low (no hoisting; root has no package.json)
phenotype-landing.notes: Best-documented of the 8. SPEC.md codifies invariants (no cross-site coupling, Taskfile.yml SITES var, subtree-pull reversibility). Exemplary factory pattern.

thegent.arch_doc: ARCHITECTURE.md (44L, skeleton) + ARCHITECTURE_OVERVIEW.md (full) + SPEC.md (39L, 1 hex marker)
thegent.cycles: not detected (Python; would need pydeps run)
thegent.notes: Cleanest hexagonal implementation in scope. Both ARCHITECTURE.md (skeleton, admits future) and ARCHITECTURE_OVERVIEW.md (full provider-routing narrative). core+ports+adapters+domain+use_cases = textbook layout.

OmniRoute.domain_boundaries: clear (src/{app,components,lib,hooks,styles,types}; lib/ has provider adapters + router)
OmniRoute.hex_markers: 5 — src/domain, src/lib/adapters, src/lib/db/adapters (provider-adapter pattern explicit in SPEC)
OmniRoute.module_coupling: moderate-high (1485 TS files; lib/ is the coupling hotspot)
OmniRoute.notes: Provider-agnostic LLM router. SPEC.md states design principles (ProviderAdapter trait, policy-as-data, streaming-first). Lacks ARCHITECTURE.md at root; SPEC.md partially substitutes.

rankings.rationale: full hexagonal layout in code; dual arch docs (skeleton + overview)
exemplary factory pattern, SPEC.md codifies invariants
60 crates with semantic prefix, honest skeleton arch doc
provider-adapter pattern explicit in SPEC, no ARCHITECTURE.md
small focused workspace, no formal arch doc
IaC, low coupling by nature, lacks ARCHITECTURE.md
flat tool grab-bag, no arch doc, no boundaries

gaps: Only thegent has real hexagonal dir structure (core/domain/adapters/use_cases/ports/infra)
phenotype-tooling and phenotype-shared lack arch docs entirely
Cargo cycles not verified (cargo metadata skipped for speed; resolver=2 mitigates)
TS/JS cycles not verified (madge/madge-cli not run)
phenotype-shared path mismatch — user asked for 'phenotype-shared' but dir is 'phenoShared'
recommendations: Add ARCHITECTURE.md to: phenotype-infra, phenotype-tooling, phenotype-journeys, OmniRoute
Resolve phenotype-shared path mismatch (rename or document alias)
Expand FocalPoint/thegent skeleton ARCHITECTURE.md to per-crate ownership maps
Run cargo metadata + madge in a follow-up audit for cycle detection
Adopt thegent's hex layout as the org reference (core/domain/adapters/use_cases/ports)
